summary: External URLs from API responses must be validated with `safeExternalUrl(url, { allowedHosts? })` in `frontend/src/utils/url.ts` before binding to `href`/`src`; use scheme-only for unknown sources (news feeds) and scheme+allowlist for known sources (tweet URLs: `['twitter.com', 'x.com', 't.co']`); null return = render as plain text, no link/thumbnail.
